app.title: tetani (Farmers' Dream)
app.tagline: Detect surplus early. Protect every harvest.
app.data_banner: Harvest, buyer, and capacity data in this prototype are simulated.

welcome.heading: Welcome to tetani
welcome.description: Early-warning and decision-support system for chili farmer cooperatives.
welcome.purpose: tetani helps cooperatives spot harvest surplus risk seven days early and prepare a distribution plan.
welcome.hero_caption: Simulated red bird's-eye chili pilot landscape in Kabupaten Magelang.
welcome.choose_workspace: Choose how you want to begin
welcome.load_demo_desc: Load deterministic simulated data for Koperasi Tani Merapi Sejahtera.
welcome.start_empty_desc: Start with an empty workspace and no operational data.
welcome.disclaimer: This is a hackathon prototype. All operational data is simulated.
welcome.workspace_demo_ready: Demo data initialized successfully. / Data demo berhasil diinisialisasi.
welcome.workspace_empty_ready: Empty workspace initialized successfully. / Workspace kosong berhasil diinisialisasi.

features.predict_desc: Early-warning radar to anticipate when harvest volume exceeds market absorption.
features.match_desc: Intelligent allocation to compatible buyers based on grade and delivery priority.
features.optimize_desc: Factor in transportation limits to prevent operational bottlenecks.

empty.radar: No harvest plans yet. Complete the setup steps so tetani can calculate seven-day surplus risk.
empty.harvest: No harvest plans yet. Use the form below to add your first harvest plan.
empty.buyers: No buyers yet. Add a buyer to enable allocation.
empty.capacity: No distribution capacity set. Configure daily capacity to enable optimization.
empty.analysis: No analysis yet. Run analysis after harvest and buyer data is available.

state.coming_soon: Coming soon in the next implementation phase.

factor.supply_demand_gap: Supply exceeds compatible demand ({value:.1%}); contribution {points:.1f} points.
factor.harvest_concentration: Harvest is concentrated on one day ({value:.1%}); contribution {points:.1f} points.
factor.transport_capacity_gap: Daily transport capacity is insufficient ({value:.1%}); contribution {points:.1f} points.
factor.weather_disruption: Available weather disruption context is {value:.1%}; contribution {points:.1f} points.
factor.estimate_uncertainty: Quantity-weighted estimate uncertainty is {value:.1%}; contribution {points:.1f} points.

radar.provenance: Simulated operational data · advisory seven-day estimate.
radar.weather_continues: Analysis continues with zero weather disruption contribution when weather is unavailable.
radar.chart_title: Harvest, Demand, and Capacity by Day
radar.chart_subtitle: See when harvest pressure exceeds market absorption and transport capacity.
radar.pilot_map_caption: Approximate cooperative pilot area · no private farm coordinates.
radar.status_summary: Most of the expected harvest does not yet have a distribution destination.
radar.setup_title: Set Up the Workspace in 4 Steps
radar.setup_harvest_help: Record member harvest estimates so available supply can be calculated.
radar.setup_buyer_help: Add distribution destinations so harvest can be allocated.
radar.setup_capacity_help: Enter daily transport limits so the distribution plan is realistic.
radar.setup_analysis_help: Analysis is available after harvest, demand, and capacity data are ready.

analysis.provenance: Simulated canonical operations · weather may be unavailable · allocations are advisory only.
analysis.running: Running deterministic risk and allocation analysis...
analysis.completed: Analysis and advisory allocation completed successfully.
analysis.interpretation: Under current conditions, {allocated:,.1f} kg can be distributed and {unallocated:,.1f} kg does not yet have a destination.
analysis.stale_warning: This analysis is stale because canonical operational data changed. Run a new base analysis before scenarios.
analysis.no_allocations: No feasible allocation is available for the current inputs.
analysis.advisory_disclaimer: Advisory simulation only. Allocations have not been executed or confirmed by buyers.

warning.weather_unavailable: Weather is unavailable; its risk contribution is zero and analysis continues.
warning.no_open_demand: No open compatible demand is available in this horizon.
warning.missing_capacity: One or more horizon dates have missing capacity and are treated as zero.
warning.no_harvest_data: No planned harvest is available for analysis.
warning.no_supply: No planned supply is available for allocation.
warning.no_demand: No eligible demand is available for allocation.
warning.zero_capacity: Distribution capacity is zero for all horizon dates.
warning.no_feasible_variables: No grade- and date-compatible allocation combination exists.
warning.solver_exception: The linear solver failed; a deterministic feasible fallback was used.
warning.solver_unsuccessful: The solver did not return success; a deterministic feasible fallback was used.

scenario.title: Try a Way to Reduce Surplus
scenario.description: Try additional demand or transport capacity. This is a simulation and does not change primary data.
scenario.name: Scenario name
scenario.completed: Temporary scenario completed. Canonical operational data was not changed.
scenario.temporary_notice: Scenario overrides and results are temporary session data and do not modify canonical harvest, demand, buyer, or capacity records.
scenario.improvement_kg: {quantity:,.1f} kg more is distributed; harvest not yet placed falls by {rate:.1%}.

action_code.add_compatible_demand: Contact or add buyer demand compatible with available grades.
action_code.increase_critical_date_capacity: Increase distribution capacity on the critical date.
action_code.verify_low_confidence_harvests: Verify low-confidence harvest estimates before execution.
action_code.review_clustered_harvest_dates: Review harvests clustered on the same date.

harvest.source_label: Data source: canonical workspace records (simulated, manual, or CSV).
harvest.summary: {count} plans · {quantity} kg in the current list
harvest.no_active_farmers: No active farmers yet. Add the first farmer before creating a harvest plan.
harvest.farmer_created: Farmer added successfully. A harvest plan can now be created.
harvest.cancel_confirmation: I confirm this harvest plan should be cancelled.

buyers.provenance: Canonical simulated buyers, demand, and seven-day distribution capacity.
buyers.summary: {count} active buyers are available for distribution.
buyers.deactivate_confirmation: I confirm this buyer should be deactivated.

demand.explanation: Demand determines how much harvest and which grades a buyer can accept.
demand.empty: No buyer demands yet. Add an open demand to enable allocation.
demand.close_confirmation: I confirm this demand should be closed.
demand.no_active_buyers: Add an active buyer before creating demand.

capacity.explanation: Enter the maximum amount of chili that can be transported each day.
capacity.missing_warning: Transport capacity is missing for {count} days. Those days will be treated as 0 kg and may limit distribution.

workspace.reset_description: Reset clears operational data and deterministically recreates the current mode.
workspace.reset_confirmation: I confirm the workspace reset. / Saya mengonfirmasi reset workspace.

error.validation: Invalid data. Check the input and try again. / Data tidak valid. Periksa input dan coba lagi.
error.conflict: Data conflicts with an existing record. / Data bertentangan dengan catatan yang ada.
error.not_found: Required data was not found. / Data yang diperlukan tidak ditemukan.
error.database: The database could not be accessed. Please retry. / Database tidak dapat diakses. Coba lagi.
error.system: Workspace initialization failed. Please retry. / Workspace gagal diinisialisasi. Coba lagi.
